summary.headline: Bunge Limited Finance Corp amends and restates its revolving credit agreement.
summary.narrative_summary: Bunge Limited Finance Corp has amended and restated its existing revolving credit agreement, with a total commitment of $3.2 billion.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Amended and restated revolving credit agreement with a total commitment of $3.2 billion.

extraction_notes: Numbers are in millions of USD; filing does not provide specific details on segments, facilities, or leadership changes.
